sections.paragraph:
Original: מדמנּה

Transliteration: madmannâh

Phonetic: mad-man-naw'

BDB Definition:

Madmannah = "dunghill"
  1. a descendant of Caleb (noun proper masculine)
  2. one of the towns in the south district of Judah (noun proper locative)

Origin: a variation for H4087

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech:
